name: White Rock Visitor Center
description: White Rock Visitor Center is a local information hub offering maps, exhibits, and guidance for exploring White Rock, Los Alamos, and nearby outdoor attractions.

name: Pig & Fig Cafe
description: Pig & Fig Cafe is a cozy White Rock café and bakery known for gourmet comfort food, French-style desserts, and locally loved breakfast and lunch offerings.

name: JR's BB+
description: JR’s BB+ is a popular White Rock food truck serving New Mexican breakfast burritos, chile, and quick comfort food loved by locals.

name: Anytime Fitness
description: Anytime Fitness is a 24/7 gym in White Rock offering cardio equipment, strength training, personal coaching, and worldwide access to Anytime Fitness locations.

name: Del Norte Credit Union
description: Del Norte Credit Union is a community-focused credit union offering personal banking, loans, and financial services to residents of northern New Mexico.

name: Enterprise Bank & Trust
description: Enterprise Bank & Trust is a regional community bank offering personal banking, business services, mortgages, and financial planning for northern New Mexico residents and businesses.

name: White Rock Toys and Gaming
description: White Rock Toys & Gaming is a locally owned hobby and game shop offering toys, collectibles, trading card games, tabletop gaming, and community play space for all ages.
